fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 9 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-19. Projects: repo-copilot, context-links, afo. Top concepts: two-step-boot, projects.json, boot-registry, G-000-v2.4, context-links, AFO, ContextProfile, machine-readable-identity.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL pointing to identity gist, not generated text. Build order finalized across 4 phases.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with append_note as slot 3. Minimum viable note = title+date+source+cid.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Charlie Space instructions need same turn-level mandate.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone + brain.json read primitive
notes.decisions: adapter_ref field added to QA.Stone gist block. G-008 ALERT type formalized. Charlie agent slot seeded. brain.json read primitive implemented.
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started. notion-ops SKILL Stone gist_id is null.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB. append_note is canonical session-end write primitive.
notes.open_questions: When to build brain.json read primitive? Alice still needs: adapter_ref QA.Stone amendment, G-008 ALERT gist, Charlie agent slot.

notes.title: AFO Worker source recovered — index.js pushed back to GitHub
notes.decisions: Recovered full Worker source from commit e2df086. Pushed to parallel-internet-sites main. Deploy pipeline needed.
notes.open_questions: Turnstile end-to-end test still pending. Deploy GitHub Action not yet wired.

notes.title: Context Links Phase 1 built — repo scaffold, app shell, 11 components, API routes, public files
notes.decisions: Phase 1 scaffold complete. Repo: nothinginfinity/context-links. 11 components, 6 API routes, 5 public files, JSON Schema. Project handoff at spaces/context-links/handoff.md.
notes.open_questions: specs/context-links.spec.html not yet committed to repo. Local smoke test not verified. Phase 2 persistence layer choice pending.

notes.title: Two-step boot system built — projects.json registry + G-000 v2.4
notes.decisions: Created spaces/gists/projects.json as canonical project registry. Updated G-000 to v2.4 with two-step boot protocol in Section 2b. Added hard rule: Alice must update projects.json on every new project creation or status change. Universal Space instructions prompt designed for any Alice space.
notes.open_questions: Bob and Claude Space instructions not yet updated to reference projects.json. Future: add Bob-specific boot commands to projects.json entries.
